## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is the pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're gonna talk about why you should publish a video every day Let's go Here's the biggest benefit to publishing a video every day So I just hit 100 days in a row and I feel this in my bones Just know that as a video creator you will not see noticeable improvement from day to day or week to week But because you publish every day you'll quickly find the ways to make the tiniest of improvements And a bunch of those tiny improvements add up look I totally get it It can be frustrating if the progress from all this hard work doesn't smack you in the face But if I were to take a step back and look at the 300 or so videos I've created during the past six months I see it now and truly I'm super proud of what I created those first few months But I know that what I'm creating right now is better And I also know that what I create next month will be better than what I'm creating now And that's why I'm encouraging you to take this approach with me publish every day Just keep your head down and stay stubbornly consistent follow for more So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok If you're not already following me on TikTok do so at John Loomer can also keep following me here Don't forget to subscribe rate and review until next time do awesome things
